stories.title: Nvidia Faces High Bar to Sustain AI Rally

stories.title: AI Boom Adds Pressure to Warsh’s Bond-Market Bind
stories.summary: With Kevin Warsh set to take office on Friday and the war-driven price shock sending bond yields higher, analysts say a widely-used indicator is suggesting AI is worsening the Fed's inflation problem. James Egelhof, Chief US Economist at BNP Paribas, discusses the Fed's rate path, inflation pressures, and how AI ties into the mix. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Putin Leaves Beijing With Little Progress on Key Gas Pipeline

stories.title: US Treasuries Jump as Trump Cites ‘Final Stages’ With Iran

stories.title: Oil Extends Decline as Traders Weigh Trump’s Latest Iran Threats
stories.summary: Oil fell for a second day as traders weighed US President Donald Trump’s latest threat to resume strikes on Iran. Paul Sankey, Founder of Sankey Research, discusses the outlook for gasoline prices heading into the summer as the Strait of Hormuz remains shuttered. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: JPM’s Kelly Sees Fed’s Warsh Holding Rates in First Vote

stories.title: What to Watch for In Nvidia Earnings After the Bell

Investors will also look for guidance on its long-term sales forecast and trying to sell AI processors in China. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
